productDisplayName: Puma Men Ikonis 2 Grey Sports Shoes
description: Get used to superior comfort and performance during your run with these Ikonis 2 shoes from puma. These shoes work as hard as you to help you run better and look great doing it. Team these with jeans and tees for a casual look when you're not out training. UpperMesh upper with synthetic overlays for a high degree of breathability and stabilityFormstripe and cat logo on the sides for added comfort and styleLace-ups for snug FitMidsoleEVA midsole for absolute cushioning and improved shock absorption OrthoLite sockliner for more comfort, material regeneration, air circulation and anti-microbial functionOutsoleArchTec technology to guide the foot through a natural transition from touch-down to toe-offLong-lasting CELL unit in the heel for improved shock absorptionEverTrack, a long-lasting composite used in the outsole, to provide durability in high-wear areasAggressive pattern with flex grooves for enhanced flexibility of the feetshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
